title: KAHEIGN Multipurpose Non Slip Mat, 50CM x 200CM PVC Anti Slip Rug Pad Underlay Carpet Grip Mat Drawer Shelf Liner Waterproof Floor Cushion Mats for Home Office Cars Kitchen Bathroom (Black)
features: [High-quality] Made of high-quality PVC foam material, waterproof and 100% eco-friendly, harmless and odorless, the open grid structure allows the carpet to breathable, and protect the floor from damage

[Anti-slip] High anti-slip performance PVC material with open grid structure design, has extremely strong frictional traction, can effective prevent mats and carpets from sliding and wrinking on smooth floor
[Size] 50cm x 200cm, can be easily cut along the grid into any size and shape according to different usage requirements, such as rectangle, square, circle, etc, can meeting different daily needs
[Easy to use] Just place the mat on the floor, then place the carpet on it and scrape off the mat edges; Easy to clean, just detergent can be added as needed, then air-dried for next use

[Applicable] It can be used as a placemat, cutlery tray drawer and shelf liner protector, dinner tray mat, car dashboard cushion, non-slip mat under the carpet; Hard floors, tiles, linen and vinyl floors gripper etc
description: Product description KAHEIGN 50CM x 200CM PVC Multipurpose Non Slip Mat can be used as a placemat, cutlery tray drawer and shelf liner protector; dinner tray mat, car dashboard cushion, non-slip mat under the carpet; hard floors, tiles, linen and vinyl floors gripper etc. Feature: - Made of high-quality PVC and polyester materials, 100% eco-friendly, , the open grid structure allows the carpet to breathable. - High anti-slip performance PVC material with open grid structure design, has extremely strong frictional traction, can effective prevent slipping. - Size: 50cm x 200cm, can be easily cut along the grid into any size and shape according to different usage requirements. - Just place the mat on the floor, then place the carpet on it and scrape off the mat edges; Easy to clean, and hand washable. Specifications: Material: PVC foam Color: Black Size: 50cm x 200cm Thickness: 1.5mm Grid: Square Cuttable: Yes Package included: 1 x Anti Slip Rug Pads Safety Warning Keep away from heat or open flames.
